query:
SELECT 
  dsl.digestType,
  dsl.scheduledFor,
  dsl.sentAt,
  dsl.status,
  dsl.error
FROM digestScheduleLog dsl
WHERE dsl.scheduledFor >= '2026-06-01'
ORDER BY dsl.scheduledFor DESC
LIMIT 10;
